extra: echo '=== CHECK .ex5 ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/'*.ex5 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO .ex5' && echo '=== METAEDITOR LOG ===' && tail -30 '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/metaeditor.log' 2>/dev/null || echo 'No metaeditor log' && echo '=== TRY COMPILE ===' && timeout 30 wine '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/metaeditor64.exe' /compile:'MQL5\Experts\PropFirmBot\PropFirmBot.mq5' /log 2>&1; sleep 5 && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/'*.ex5 2>/dev/null && echo 'COMPILE SUCCESS' || echo 'STILL NO .ex5'
